contentHtml:
Offline Hands-On Summer Grazing Boards Workshop 🧀✨

Workshop Details

Date: May 9; 1.30 pm – 4.30 pm
Hands-On, In-Person Experience
Location: Studio Love & Flour by Pooja, Goregaon (E), Mumbai
Price: Rs.5999/- (Early Bird: Rs. 4999/-)

 

 

What You’ll Learn

You’ll learn to create 4 distinct styles of grazing boards, each designed with a different flavour profile and visual approach:

  • Whipped Cheese and Bread Board
  • Edible Art Canvas
  • Sweet Indulgence Dessert Board
  • Gourmet Savoury Grazing Board

This workshop goes beyond just assembling ingredients. You’ll learn how to pair, balance, style, and present different grazing boards that feel luxurious, intentional, and truly memorable. and learn how to

  • Customise boards for house parties, festive gifting, premium orders and events
  • Portion Planning
  •  Packaging Ideas for take-away and delivery
  •  How to position grazing boards as a high-value, premium product
  • Understanding pricing based on size, ingredients, and audience
Register now

Recipes that will be taught:

Signature Flavoured Cheeses (Made from Scratch)
Learn to create versatile, flavoured soft cheeses — with guidance on using store-bought alternatives as well:

  • Herbed Garlic Cheese
  • Honey Cinnamon Cheese with Candied Walnuts
  • Burnt Garlic & Scallion Cheese
  • Berry Balsamic Cheese
  • Mango Jalapeño Cheese

Dips & Spreads

  • Mediterranean Olive & Feta Dip
  • Pistachio Pesto

Gourmet Bite-Sized Elements

  • Pesto Cucumber Sandwich Bites
  • Smashed Crispy Potatoes with Sriracha Dip
  • Avocado Chocolate Mousse Canapés
  • Mini Croissant Puffs with Chocolate Dip
  • Dubai Kunafa Crunch Bites

Flavoured Nuts

  • Coffee Frosted Almonds
  • Spiced Masala Nut Mix

Fresh Skewers

  • Melon Ombre Skewers
  • Caprese Skewers
  • Tropical Fruit Skewers

Bonus Recipes (Detailed Written Guide)

  • Chocolate Brownie
  • Rich Chocolate Ganache
  • Sizzling Chilli Oil

Beyond the Board

Cheese Foundations

  • How to make cream cheese from scratch
  • Understanding different types of cheeses (soft, hard, spreads)
  • How to flavour and customise cheeses

Flavour Pairing & Composition

  • How to balance flavours: creamy, salty, sweet, tangy, crunchy
  • Pairing cheeses with accompaniments for a complete board
  • Building cohesive boards instead of random combinations

Board Styling & Presentation

  • Elements of a perfect grazing board
  • Selecting the right sized serving boards/platters
  • Selecting breads, crackers, fruits, nuts & spreads
  • Quick garnishing techniques for a polished finish
  • How to create height, flow, and visual balance
  • Portioning for small vs large gatherings

What You Take Home

  • 1 fully assembled grazing board made by you
  • 1 mini edible art canvas
  • Printed/digital recipe booklet
  • Supplier & sourcing guidance

(Boards will be assembled for learning and styling, and contents will be carefully packed into takeaway boxes for convenience)

Why You’ll Love This Workshop 💛

  • A completely hands-on experience — not just demonstration
  • Learn a premium, trending concept that stands out instantly
  • Perfect mix of creativity, flavour, and styling
  • Beginner-friendly — no prior experience needed
  • Ideal for both personal use and business expansion
  • Small-group setting for personalised guidance

Perfect For

  • Anyone who loves hosting and entertaining
  • Home bakers looking to expand into savoury/premium offerings
  • Business owners wanting to add high-margin, aesthetic products
  • Beginners who want to learn something creative and practical
  • Anyone who enjoys working with food, styling, and presentation
Register now

title: From Passion to Purpose: Pooja’s Journey
excerptHtml: My Story Hi, I’m Pooja Ganeriwala, baker, mentor, and founder of Love & Flour by Pooja. If you had told...
contentHtml:
My Story

Hi, I’m Pooja Ganeriwala, baker, mentor, and founder of Love & Flour by Pooja.

If you had told me years ago that one day I’d be teaching thousands of bakers across the country, I would have probably laughed.

What began as a simple love for desserts slowly turned into something much bigger, a space where passion, learning, and community came together.

My journey with baking started at home, in the quiet comfort of my kitchen. I wasn’t professionally trained, just endlessly curious. I spent years experimenting, failing, trying again, and learning from bakers I admired around the world. Each success and even the failures taught me something new, not just about baking, but about patience, creativity, and the joy of sharing something made with love.

Over time, that love evolved into a purpose, to make professional-quality, egg-free baking accessible to everyone. Today, Love & Flour by Pooja has grown into one of India’s most loved online baking education platforms, where thousands of students have learned to turn their passion into confidence and for many, even into thriving businesses.

Teaching, for me, is more than just sharing recipes. It’s about creating a safe, encouraging space where people, especially women, can believe in themselves, explore their creativity, and find independence through their craft. Watching my students grow, experiment, and find their voice in the kitchen has been the most fulfilling part of this journey.

 

Whether you’re here to learn your first cake or to build your own baking brand, I’m so glad you found your way here.
Because at Love & Flour, it’s not just about baking. It’s about creating with heart, learning with joy, and discovering what’s possible when you mix a little courage with a lot of flour.

POOJA GANERIWALA

title: FAQs About Love & Flour Workshops
excerptHtml: Frequently Asked Questions Have questions? We’ve got you covered! Whether you’re curious about our workshops, access, payments, or baking journey...
contentHtml:
Frequently Asked Questions

Have questions? We’ve got you covered! Whether you’re curious about our workshops, access, payments, or baking journey — here are the most common questions students ask about Love & Flour by Pooja, answered all in one place

About Love & Flour by Pooja

What is Love & Flour by Pooja?

Love & Flour by Pooja is an online baking education platform founded by Chef Pooja Ganeriwala. We specialize in teaching professional-quality, egg-free recipes through structured workshops, designed for both home bakers and small business owners.

Workshops & Access

Are the workshops live or pre-recorded?

Most workshops are taught live, and recordings of the session are available to all enrolled students. Some older workshops are available as recordings of past live sessions. We’ll also be adding a range of pre-recorded classes to the website soon, allowing you to learn at your own pace anytime.

How long do I get access to the recordings?

All workshops conducted till 2025 come with 2 years of access from the date of the live session.
During this time, you can revisit the recordings, notes, and other shared materials anytime.
New workshops conducted after December 2025 will have 2 years of access from the date of purchase.
Just to be sure, please check the workshop validity mentioned on each course page before enrolling.



How can I access my workshop after enrolling?

Once you register, you’ll receive an email (and/or WhatsApp message) with all access details.
Depending on the course format, you’ll either:
• Get a link to join a private Facebook group (where the live session and recordings are hosted), or
• Access your class through your student dashboard on this website (for newer workshops).



What does each workshop include?

Every workshop typically includes:
• Step-by-step video lessons
• Detailed recipe notes
• Ingredient brand recommendations
• Pricing, shelf-life, and storage guidance
• Limited WhatsApp support
Exact inclusions vary by class — please refer to each course page for details.



Learning Experience

I’m a beginner. Can I still join?

Absolutely! Our step-by-step classes and detailed recipe PDFs make baking easy for all skill levels. Our workshops are designed to be beginner-friendly yet advanced enough for professionals. Every recipe is tested for clarity, precision, and reliability.

Do I need to join live, or can I watch later?

Joining live is optional. If you miss the live session, you can always watch the full recording later within your access period.

Are your classes egg-free?

Yes. All recipes taught under Love & Flour by Pooja are 100% egg-free.

Do the recipes work in a home kitchen?

Absolutely. All our recipes are tested multiple times in standard home ovens and kitchen setups. You don’t need professional equipment — just basic baking tools and ingredients easily available locally or online.

What language are the classes conducted in?

All sessions are conducted in English, with simple explanations and clear visuals to ensure understanding for everyone.

Payments & Policies

What payment options do you accept?

We accept all major Indian payment methods via Razorpay — including debit/credit cards, UPI, and net banking.
For international students, payments can be made securely through PayPal.

Do you offer refunds or transfers?

Once enrolled, registrations are non-refundable and non-transferable. Please double-check all details before enrolling.
For complete details, please refer to our Refund & Cancellation Policy page on the website.

Usage & Permissions

Can I sell the recipes that I learn in the workshops?

Yes, you’re welcome to use the recipes you learn for your own bakery or business — many of our students do. However, the class content (videos, notes, or materials) cannot be copied, shared, or used for teaching purposes.

Can I share the class materials or videos with others?

No. All workshop materials — including recipes, notes, and recordings — are the intellectual property of Ms. Pooja Ganeriwala and meant strictly for personal use. Reproducing, distributing, or selling any part of this content without written permission is strictly prohibited and may lead to legal action.

Support & Contact

What if I face technical issues?

If you face issues accessing your class, video, or notes, simply email us at support@loveandflourbypooja.com with your registered email ID and workshop name. Our support team will get back to you within 24–48 working hours.

How can I contact you?

For student-related queries, write to support@loveandflourbypooja.com.
For collaborations, partnerships, or corporate workshops, reach us at contact@loveandflourbypooja.com.



Gifting & Corporate Options

Can I gift a workshop to someone?

Yes! You can purchase a workshop as a gift. Once you register, just email us the recipient’s name, email ID, and message at support@loveandflourbypooja.com, and we’ll set up their access with a personalized note.



Do you offer group or corporate workshops?

Yes, we host team-building and festive workshops for corporates. You can learn more or request a proposal by writing to collaborate@loveandflourbypooja.com.



Access & Devices

Can I join from my phone or tablet?

Yes, all workshops and recordings can be viewed from any device — phone, tablet, or computer — with a stable internet connection.

Looking for something else? 

 

CONTACT US

title: Cancellation & Refund Policy
excerptHtml: At Love and Flour by Pooja, we strive to provide the best online learning experience. As our products are digital courses (recorded or...
contentHtml:
At Love and Flour by Pooja, we strive to provide the best online learning experience. As our products are digital courses (recorded or live), we follow a transparent cancellation and refund policy.

1. Cancellations

  • Once a course has been purchased and access has been granted, cancellations are not possible.
  • For live workshops, cancellation requests may be considered only if received at least 7 days prior to the scheduled start date. Requests received after this period will not be eligible for cancellation.

2. Refunds

  • Recorded/Pre-recorded Courses: Since access to content is granted immediately upon purchase, refunds are not available.
  • Live Workshops / Special Programs: In cases where cancellations are requested within the specified time (7 days prior), refunds will be processed after deducting applicable administrative or payment gateway charges.
  • If Love and Flour by Pooja cancels or reschedules a live class/workshop, registered learners will be offered either a full refund or credit towards another program, as per their choice.
  • Please note – 15-20 working days will be taken to process the refund and credit the amount to the learner’s bank account / payment mode that was used while placing the order.

3. Course Access Duration

  • Access duration is clearly mentioned in the course details (typically 2 years, but may vary). Refunds will not be entertained on grounds of dissatisfaction with access timelines once disclosed at purchase.

4. Technical Issues

  • If you face technical issues that prevent you from accessing a course, please contact us at tech.loveandflourbypooja@gmail.com. We will make every effort to resolve the issue.
  • Refunds will not be provided for issues related to internet connectivity, device compatibility, or other factors outside our control.

5. Discretionary Refunds

  • In rare cases, refunds may be considered at the sole discretion of Love and Flour by Pooja, subject to review.

  • All our courses are digital and delivered online only.

2. Access Timelines

  • Each course comes with a specified access duration, clearly mentioned in the course material or course description.

  • Some courses may have shorter access periods (e.g., 6 months or 1 year) while others may provide longer access.
  • Please check the course details before enrolling to understand the specific access timeline for that course.

3. Changes to Access Periods

  • Love and Flour by Pooja reserves the right to modify access timelines if required, but any such changes will be communicated to learners in advance.
  • Extensions beyond the specified access period may be offered from time to time as part of promotions, memberships, or subscriptions.

4. No Physical Shipping

5. Support

Privacy Policy

Last updated: August 30, 2025

This Privacy Policy describes Our policies and procedures on the collection, use and disclosure of Your information when You use the Service and tells You about Your privacy rights and how the law protects You.

We use Your Personal data to provide and improve the Service. By using the Service, You agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

Interpretation and Definitions

Interpretation

The words of which the initial letter is capitalized have meanings defined under the following conditions. The following definitions shall have the same meaning regardless of whether they appear in singular or in plural.

Definitions

For the purposes of this Privacy Policy:

    • Account means a unique account created for You to access our Service or parts of our Service.

    • Affiliate means an entity that controls, is controlled by or is under common control with a party, where “control” means ownership of 50% or more of the shares, equity interest or other securities entitled to vote for election of directors or other managing authority.

    • Company (referred to as either “the Company”, “We”, “Us” or “Our” in this Agreement) refers to Fab Foods, 1311, Corporate Annexe, next to Udyog Bhavan, Sonawala road, Goregaon East, Mumbai 400063, India.

    • Cookies are small files that are placed on Your computer, mobile device or any other device by a website, containing the details of Your browsing history on that website among its many uses.

    • Country refers to: Maharashtra, India

    • Device means any device that can access the Service such as a computer, a cellphone or a digital tablet.

    • Personal Data is any information that relates to an identified or identifiable individual.

    • Service refers to the Website.

    • Service Provider means any natural or legal person who processes the data on behalf of the Company. It refers to third-party companies or individuals employed by the Company to facilitate the Service, to provide the Service on behalf of the Company, to perform services related to the Service or to assist the Company in analyzing how the Service is used.

    • Usage Data refers to data collected automatically, either generated by the use of the Service or from the Service infrastructure itself (for example, the duration of a page visit).

    • Website refers to Love and Flour By Pooja, accessible from loveandflourbypooja.com

    • You means the individual accessing or using the Service, or the company, or other legal entity on behalf of which such individual is accessing or using the Service, as applicable.

Collecting and Using Your Personal Data

Types of Data Collected

Personal Data

While using Our Service, We may ask You to provide Us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify You. Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to:

    • Email address

    • First name and last name

    • Phone number

    • Address, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City, Country

  •  

Usage Data

Usage Data is collected automatically when using the Service.

Usage Data may include information such as Your Device’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that You visit, the time and date of Your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.

When You access the Service by or through a mobile device, We may collect certain information automatically, including, but not limited to, the type of mobile device You use, Your mobile device unique ID, the IP address of Your mobile device, Your mobile operating system, the type of mobile Internet browser You use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.

We may also collect information that Your browser sends whenever You visit our Service or when You access the Service by or through a mobile device.

Tracking Technologies and Cookies

We use Cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on Our Service and store certain information. Tracking technologies used are beacons, tags, and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze Our Service. The technologies We use may include:

    • Cookies or Browser Cookies. A cookie is a small file placed on Your Device. You can instruct Your browser to refuse all Cookies or to indicate when a Cookie is being sent. However, if You do not accept Cookies, You may not be able to use some parts of our Service. Unless you have adjusted Your browser setting so that it will refuse Cookies, our Service may use Cookies.

    • Web Beacons. Certain sections of our Service and our emails may contain small electronic files known as web beacons (also referred to as clear gifs, pixel tags, and single-pixel gifs) that permit the Company, for example, to count users who have visited those pages or opened an email and for other related website statistics (for example, recording the popularity of a certain section and verifying system and server integrity).

Cookies can be “Persistent” or “Session” Cookies. Persistent Cookies remain on Your personal computer or mobile device when You go offline, while Session Cookies are deleted as soon as You close Your web browser.

We use both Session and Persistent Cookies for the purposes set out below:

    • Necessary / Essential Cookies Type: Session Cookies Administered by: Us Purpose: These Cookies are essential to provide You with services available through the Website and to enable You to use some of its features. They help to authenticate users and prevent fraudulent use of user accounts. Without these Cookies, the services that You have asked for cannot be provided, and We only use these Cookies to provide You with those services.

    • Cookies Policy / Notice Acceptance Cookies Type: Persistent Cookies Administered by: Us Purpose: These Cookies identify if users have accepted the use of cookies on the Website.

    • Functionality Cookies Type: Persistent Cookies Administered by: Us Purpose: These Cookies allow us to remember choices You make when You use the Website, such as remembering your login details or language preference. The purpose of these Cookies is to provide You with a more personal experience and to avoid You having to re-enter your preferences every time You use the Website.

For more information about the cookies we use and your choices regarding cookies, please visit our Cookies Policy or the Cookies section of our Privacy Policy.

Use of Your Personal Data

The Company may use Personal Data for the following purposes:

    • To provide and maintain our Service, including to monitor the usage of our Service.

    • To manage Your Account: to manage Your registration as a user of the Service. The Personal Data You provide can give You access to different functionalities of the Service that are available to You as a registered user.

    • For the performance of a contract: the development, compliance and undertaking of the purchase contract for the products, items or services You have purchased or of any other contract with Us through the Service.

    • To contact You: To contact You by email, telephone calls, SMS, or other equivalent forms of electronic communication, such as a mobile application’s push notifications regarding updates or informative communications related to the functionalities, products or contracted services, including the security updates, when necessary or reasonable for their implementation.

    • To provide You with news, special offers and general information about other goods, services and events which we offer that are similar to those that you have already purchased or enquired about unless You have opted not to receive such information.

    • To manage Your requests: To attend and manage Your requests to Us.

    • For business transfers: We may use Your information to evaluate or conduct a merger, divestiture, restructuring, reorganization, dissolution, or other sale or transfer of some or all of Our assets, whether as a going concern or as part of bankruptcy, liquidation, or similar proceeding, in which Personal Data held by Us about our Service users is among the assets transferred.

    • For other purposes: We may use Your information for other purposes, such as data analysis, identifying usage trends, determining the effectiveness of our promotional campaigns and to evaluate and improve our Service, products, services, marketing and your experience.

We may share Your personal information in the following situations:

    • With Service Providers: We may share Your personal information with Service Providers to monitor and analyze the use of our Service, to contact You.

    • For business transfers: We may share or transfer Your personal information in connection with, or during negotiations of, any merger, sale of Company assets, financing, or acquisition of all or a portion of Our business to another company.

    • With Affiliates: We may share Your information with Our affiliates, in which case we will require those affiliates to honor this Privacy Policy. Affiliates include Our parent company and any other subsidiaries, joint venture partners or other companies that We control or that are under common control with Us.

    • With business partners: We may share Your information with Our business partners to offer You certain products, services or promotions.

    • With other users: when You share personal information or otherwise interact in the public areas with other users, such information may be viewed by all users and may be publicly distributed outside.

    • With Your consent: We may disclose Your personal information for any other purpose with Your consent.

Retention of Your Personal Data

The Company will retain Your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use Your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies.

The Company will also retain Usage Data for internal analysis purposes. Usage Data is generally retained for a shorter period of time, except when this data is used to strengthen the security or to improve the functionality of Our Service, or We are legally obligated to retain this data for longer time periods.

Transfer of Your Personal Data

Your information, including Personal Data, is processed at the Company’s operating offices and in any other places where the parties involved in the processing are located. It means that this information may be transferred to — and maintained on — computers located outside of Your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ than those from Your jurisdiction.

Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by Your submission of such information represents Your agreement to that transfer.

The Company will take all steps reasonably necessary to ensure that Your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of Your Personal Data will take place to an organization or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of Your data and other personal information.

Delete Your Personal Data

You have the right to delete or request that We assist in deleting the Personal Data that We have collected about You.

Our Service may give You the ability to delete certain information about You from within the Service.

You may update, amend, or delete Your information at any time by signing in to Your Account, if you have one, and visiting the account settings section that allows you to manage Your personal information. You may also contact Us to request access to, correct, or delete any personal information that You have provided to Us.

Please note, however, that We may need to retain certain information when we have a legal obligation or lawful basis to do so.

Disclosure of Your Personal Data

Business Transactions

If the Company is involved in a merger, acquisition or asset sale, Your Personal Data may be transferred. We will provide notice before Your Personal Data is transferred and becomes subject to a different Privacy Policy.

Law enforcement

Under certain circumstances, the Company may be required to disclose Your Personal Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities (e.g. a court or a government agency).

Other legal requirements

The Company may disclose Your Personal Data in the good faith and belief that such action is necessary to:

    • Comply with a legal obligation

    • Protect and defend the rights or property of the Company

    • Prevent or investigate possible wrongdoing in connection with the Service

    • Protect the personal safety of Users of the Service or the public

    • Protect against legal liability

Security of Your Personal Data

The security of Your Personal Data is important to Us, but remember that no method of transmission over the Internet, or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. While We strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect Your Personal Data, We cannot guarantee its absolute security.

Children’s Privacy

Our Service does not address anyone under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from anyone under the age of 13. If You are a parent or guardian and You are aware that Your child has provided Us with Personal Data, please contact Us. If We become aware that We have collected Personal Data from anyone under the age of 13 without verification of parental consent, We take steps to remove that information from Our servers.

If We need to rely on consent as a legal basis for processing Your information and Your country requires consent from a parent, We may require Your parent’s consent before We collect and use that information.

Links to Other Websites

Our Service may contain links to other websites that are not operated by Us. If You click on a third party link, You will be directed to that third party’s site. We strongly advise You to review the Privacy Policy of every site You visit.

We have no control over and assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third party sites or services.

Changes to this Privacy Policy

We may update Our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify You of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page.

We will let You know via email and/or a prominent notice on Our Service, prior to the change becoming effective and update the “Last updated” date at the top of this Privacy Policy.

You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, You can contact us:

  • By email: tech.loveandflourbypooja@gmail.com

title: About Us
excerptHtml: At Love & Flour by Pooja, we believe that baking is more than a skill. It’s a language of creativity,...
contentHtml:
At Love & Flour by Pooja, we believe that baking is more than a skill. It’s a language of creativity, care, and connection. We exist to make professional-quality, egg-free baking simple, approachable, and inspiring, no matter where you are in your journey.

Every workshop, every recipe, and every resource we share is designed with one promise in mind: to help you bake with confidence, express yourself creatively, and build something you’re proud of.

Our Values

Simplicity
 We believe learning should be joyful, not intimidating. Our methods are approachable, practical, and designed for real home kitchens.

Excellence
 Every recipe is tested, refined, and crafted with care, ensuring professional results that never compromise on quality or flavour.

Empowerment
 Baking can change lives. We’re here to help you discover your potential, whether that means mastering your first cake or starting your own small business.

Community
 We’re more than a platform. We’re a family of bakers who support, celebrate, and grow together.

What Makes Us Different

Egg-Free Without Compromise
 We’ve redefined what egg-free baking can be. Delicious, indulgent, and perfectly balanced. Recipes that match and often exceed the quality of traditional baking.

Designed for Real Kitchens
 Our methods are built around home bakers. No complicated tools or commercial equipment needed.

Support That Lasts
 Every class comes with video access, live Q&As, and continued long-term support, so your learning doesn’t stop when the class ends.

Beyond Recipes
 Our workshops go deeper than just “how to bake.” We focus on technique, business skills, and product presentation, helping you think like a baker and an entrepreneur so that you can actually thrive in the baking world.

Heart-Led Teaching
 Every course is designed to teach not just technique, but confidence, so you enjoy every step of your journey.

Our Promise

To make learning fun, reliable, and deeply rewarding.
To be honest, approachable, and supportive in everything we do.
And to remind you that behind every perfect dessert is a story, a little patience, and a whole lot of love.

Because at Love & Flour by Pooja, we don’t just teach baking,
 We nurture joy, skill, and self-belief, one recipe at a time.

excerptHtml: Learn. Bake. Flourish. Join Pooja Ganeriwala – an award-winning tutor – on a journey to master egg free recipes, savouries,...
contentHtml:
Learn. Bake. Flourish.

Join Pooja Ganeriwala – an award-winning tutor – on a journey to master egg free recipes, savouries, and delights that elevate your skills and spark joy in every bake.

Explore All Courses
Exclusive access to workshops, live sessions, course materials — all in one place.

Your Complete Baking Classroom

Focused Workshops

Step-by-step sessions designed for home bakers, enthusiasts, and professionals to master egg-free baking.

Live & Interactive

Join live classes, ask questions, and learn in real time with a community of passionate bakers.

All-in-One Resources

Access recipes, notes, and video lessons — neatly organized for learning at your own pace, anytime you need them

Exclusive Access

Get insider access to unique content from award-winning Chef Pooja Ganeriwala — available only here.

What You’ll Get Inside
Every Course

Bake Better, Learn Smarter

Every course at Love and Flour by Pooja is carefully designed to give you not just recipes, but the complete confidence to bake, learn, and grow.

  • 2-Year Access – Revisit videos and notes anytime.
  • Detailed Notes & Recipes – Foolproof, step-by-step guides.
  • Certificate of Completion – Showcase your skills.
  • Pricing, Shelf-life & Storage – Guidance for profitable, long-lasting bakes.
  • Ingredient Brand List – Trusted recommendations.
  • Q&A + Community Access – Learn and connect with bakers.
  • Extended DM Support – Get help even after class.
Start Learning Today

Bake Better, Together

Friendly lessons, practical tips, and a supportive community cheering you on

Testimonials

What Our Students Say About Us

From first-time home bakers to seasoned professionals, our students share how Love and Flour by Pooja's courses transformed their baking journey.

"Thank you Pooja for the wonderful workshops you conduct …..always well organised and planned to the T with detailed in depth recipes and follow up sessions ..I have been following your journey right from 2020.. My first one being the Papparoti one and from that time onwards I have lost the count of your classes that I have enrolled. Your classes are not only value for money but there is immense sense of satisfaction in learning as your recipes are foolproof and turn out perfect on the first try which just gives us confidence to bake and learn more. You as a teacher and we as students have always got better with every session. In Eggless baking you an authority and an epitome of dedicated teaching."

- Tejal Shreya Malani, Mumbai

"What really stands out is the level of student engagement after your class. The WhatsApp support group stays active and buzzing — it's filled with questions, recreations, and shared enthusiasm. That kind of sustained interaction is something I haven't seen in most workshops. In fact, while many instructors market their classes well beforehand, the post-class follow-through is often missing. With you, the real magic begins after the class.

And I have to say this - your recipes are so authentic and complete. You don't hold anything back, and that's why recreations by your students are so spot-on. That makes all the difference."

- A student, Kolkata

"Everything is the result of the amount of hard work and the honesty with which you teach your workshop. You also teach with this feeling that your students should do well, a very motherly instinct! I have completed my pastry Diploma and still take your classes because I just want to keep taking them. I got into this by taking your classes. Always very grateful and thankful for having found a teacher like you."

- Dilsha Vyas, Jharkhand

"Making notes is one thing and providing notes with every minute detail, variation, options n not to forget even the pictorial representation is another level thing.. No wonder your students never skip any workshop..

Jo ek baar aapka hua, wo bas ho kar hi reh gaya.. You are amazing not only as a mentor but as an expert teacher who knows how to take along all the students, be it hand holding of the weakest one or be it answering any super silly query..

Exceptionally commendable and extensive hard work done in all writing and compiling.. Three cheers to you n your able guided team for every effort out in..

I guess eventually my words will fall short telling how wonderful you are.."

- Pragya Bhatnagar, Chandigarh

"Hi Pooja. I'm blown away from the PDFs that you have curated. Its so extensive. The recipes, the notes, the theory. So much hardwork put in. The love for teaching your students with all your knowledge is commendable.

Respect."

- Vandana Jain, Chennai

"Hello Pooja Ma'am, I am a big time fan and admirer of you. U handle everything so beautifully the classes are well organised the notes are so detailed half the doubt will be cleared looking at the notes and rest in the class. Real hats off to you and your team who works tirelessly."

- Sahana Panth, Dubai

"Hello Pooja!! A big big thank you to you!! You are the best mentor l've ever come across. And I must say that each time you come up with a new workshop, you raise your bar higher n higher. Pooja you are literally spoon feeding us by giving minutest of the details. I've attended like 10-12 workshops of yours so far and made so many stuff from the workshops to sell... You give all the information about oven settings for different ovens, the yield, the pan sizes for scaling recipes, the packaging ideas, pricing points and and this time I was completely blown away when you revealed that you'll be sharing the nutritional facts of granola & energy bites workshop!!! Hats off to you and your team!! I was just thinking how much effort and dedication it takes to provide such minute details, to make sure the workshop flow is smooth, there's so much that goes into planning all this!! You are simply the best."

- Pooja Shah

"You are a brilliant teacher and even brilliant-er baker/recipe developer.

Your brownies and muffins have made me soooo much more confident in my baking journey. It's all your teaching. I have stopped watching random videos on YouTube and just buy a class from your collection if I ever feel like trying something new since the knowledge provided is on point. So blessed to have discovered you on this huge planet."

- Akruti, Rajkot

All I can say is thank you, for being so generous always.

You don't know how much your students bless you.

You're not just a great chef, but you model what it takes to be such a lovely human being.

God bless you!"

- Sneha Samel L.

My second class from you and once again I must say the best class I have taken
This was a Master Class from a Master Mentor like you Pooja and your entire team
Can't thank you enough for doing this class
I am falling short of words...
Each and every recipe was amazing, packaging, pricing, queries were taught and solved by you so well that even a first time baker will make the recipes easily and with full confidence! This is the result and confidence students gain when they have a great mentor like you not a single question was ignored or left unanswered, you cleared our doubts and gave solutions promptly, thank you so much dear Pooja
Am a fan of you Pooja and will definitely attend many more classes from you dear.
Thank you and your entire team for such a beautiful class, lots of blessings for you all.
